untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies 8-day and 18-day custom moving averages which are not in the allowed indicators list. The closest available alternatives are sma_5 and sma_10, but these do not match the original intent to front-run the popular 10/20-day system. The differenceperiod=9 parameter and exact calculation methodology cannot be represented with the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Original signal requires custom 8-period and 18-period moving averages to anticipate trend-followers using 10/20 averages. This strategy cannot be accurately translated using only the predefined moving averages (sma_5, sma_10, sma_20, sma_40, sma_50, sma_80, sma_100, sma_200, ema variants). A workaround using sma_5/sma_10 would fundamentally alter the strategy's intent and timing characteristics.
